---
title: "Section 3: Reporting and Action"
id: "OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se02-sec03"
section_id: "OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se02-sec03"
session_id: "OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se02"
toc: True
---




### In this section
<br>

- [Reporting and Action](OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se02-sec03-sp01.qmd)

```{=html}
        </a>

    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
